name: get_booking_details
description: Retrieve the details of an existing restaurant reservation using the booking ID and restaurant name.

booking_id.description: The unique identifier for the reservation

restaurant_name.description: The name of the restaurant where the reservation was made

name: create_booking
description: Create a new restaurant reservation with the specified details.

restaurant_name.description: The name of the restaurant for the reservation

guest_name.description: The name of the guest making the reservation

num_guests.description: The number of guests for the reservation

phone_number.description: Contact phone number for the reservation (optional)

name: delete_booking
description: Cancel an existing restaurant reservation using the booking ID and restaurant name.

booking_id.description: The unique identifier for the reservation to cancel

restaurant_name.description: The name of the restaurant where the reservation was made
